item.title: The Spanish Flu Spread Like Wildfire ��
item.description: A look at the 1918 influenza pandemic, its global impact, and why it is often considered one of the most severe public health crises in history.

media:content.media:title: The Spanish Flu Spread Like Wildfire ��
media:content.media:description: A look at the 1918 influenza pandemic, its global impact, and why it is often considered one of the most severe public health crises in history.

item.title: The Scuba Diver That Disappeared In A Cave
item.description: This video explores the disappearance of Ben McDaniel, reviewing the timeline, known facts, and the lingering questions surrounding his case.

media:content.media:title: The Scuba Diver That Disappeared In A Cave
media:content.media:description: This video explores the disappearance of Ben McDaniel, reviewing the timeline, known facts, and the lingering questions surrounding his case.

item.title: The Las Cruces Bowling Alley Massacre
item.description: A look at the 1990 case in Las Cruces, examining the investigation, its lasting impact on the community, and the questions that remain unresolved.

media:content.media:title: The Las Cruces Bowling Alley Massacre
media:content.media:description: A look at the 1990 case in Las Cruces, examining the investigation, its lasting impact on the community, and the questions that remain unresolved.

item.title: Cold Case Solved The Truth About Sherri Rasmussen
item.description: A long-unsolved case is revisited as investigators uncover new evidence, bringing clarity to the death of Sherri Rasmussen and how the case was ultimately resolved.

media:content.media:title: Cold Case Solved The Truth About Sherri Rasmussen
media:content.media:description: A long-unsolved case is revisited as investigators uncover new evidence, bringing clarity to the death of Sherri Rasmussen and how the case was ultimately resolved.

item.title: What Were The Strange Blobs Falling From The Sky
item.description: This episode explores bizarre incidents of unidentified gelatinous blobs falling from the sky, examining scientific explanations, eyewitness accounts, and the theories behind these strange phenomena.

media:content.media:title: What Were The Strange Blobs Falling From The Sky
media:content.media:description: This episode explores bizarre incidents of unidentified gelatinous blobs falling from the sky, examining scientific explanations, eyewitness accounts, and the theories behind these strange phenomena.

item.title: An Egyptian Vacation That Ended In Disturbing Tragedy...
item.description: This episode examines the tragic and mysterious death of Magdalena Żuk during a vacation in Egypt, exploring the unsettling events and unanswered questions surrounding her final days.

media:content.media:title: An Egyptian Vacation That Ended In Disturbing Tragedy...
media:content.media:description: This episode examines the tragic and mysterious death of Magdalena Żuk during a vacation in Egypt, exploring the unsettling events and unanswered questions surrounding her final days.

item.title: A call, a country lane, and 31 years of silence
item.description: This episode examines the disappearance of Paul Logan, highlighting how a single call and a remote country lane eventually brought attention to a mystery that remained unsolved for over three decades.

media:content.media:title: A call, a country lane, and 31 years of silence
media:content.media:description: This episode examines the disappearance of Paul Logan, highlighting how a single call and a remote country lane eventually brought attention to a mystery that remained unsolved for over three decades.

item.title: Could The Menendez Brothers Go Free?
item.description: This episode revisits the infamous Menendez brothers case, exploring their convictions for the 1989 murders of their parents and examining legal developments that raise questions about their potential release.

media:content.media:title: Could The Menendez Brothers Go Free?
media:content.media:description: This episode revisits the infamous Menendez brothers case, exploring their convictions for the 1989 murders of their parents and examining legal developments that raise questions about their potential release.
